title: Dsclavacy Scented Candles for Women - 12Pcs 2.5OZ Natural Soy Wax Long Lasting Portable Travel Tin Aromatherapy Candles, Birthday & Christmas Gifts
features: 【Popular Fragrance】: 12 pack 2.5 oz scented candles includes 12 popular scent: flax, jasmine, gardenia, lavender, rose, sage, blue campanula, vanilla, lemon, freesia, apple cinnamon, fig.Not only candles for cleansing house but also relieve anxiety when doing yoga , bathing, dating, health care.
【Natural Soy Wax】: Aromatherapy Candles gifts for women are made from pure soy wax with essential oil and an all-natural wick without artificial dyes or coloring and burn smoke-free.

【Long Lasting】: Size 2.5 oz per candle burning time approach 15-20h. 12Pack working time approach 240 hours.Creating mood, relaxation for you and guests,effective in relaxing and relieving stress, suitable for people of all ages.

【Portable and Resuable】: Each scented Soy Wax candle has a jar with exquisite artistic patterns, suitable for decorating your house or storing small things after use. For example, jewelry earrings or decorative storage container flower pots.Mini travel design make it convenient for carry to vacation and easy to pack for travel without worrying about the containers breaking.

【Best Choice for Gift】：Beautiful scented candle gift sets comes with a lovely gift box. You can give the scented candle gifts to your wife, friend, family, teacher or anyone you love in any festival such as valentine's day, mother’s day, Christmas day, birthday, teacher’s day.
description: Product description When you are eating or eating dessert, you need a romantic atmosphere at this time, you can light up candles, and the refreshing taste will slowly diffuse. When you are sleeping,bathing,doing yoga,you may need one to relax your body and clam down yourself.These scents will help you to create a comforting ambiance. 12 Pack Approx. 20H Burn Time Net weight: 70 g / 2.5 oz Tin Container Dimensions: 65 x 65 x 43 mm Made of lead-free cotton.non-toxic and smokeless Made of 100% Pure Soy Wax.Environment friendly and long lasting. Gift package.Send it to loved ones with thenatural scents of sage. Warm Note: Never leave your scented candle unattended once it’s using. Always place your scented candle on a heat-resistant surface before lighting it. When your scented candle only has a half-inch of wax left, it’s time to replace it. Scented candles shouldn’t be used for more than 2 hours at a time, and always allow the candle to cool for at least two hours before relighting it. If you don’t have a wick trimmer to trim the wicks of your scented candles, a small pair of nail scissors works well. Safety Warning Never leave your scented candle unattended once it’s using.
